LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofFiresEnabled_Des: Fires will be able to spread to roofs and ignite them, and roof fires will be able to spread to other roofs.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_RoofFiresDisabled_De: Roofs will not catch on fire, and fires will not be able to spread to roofs.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_EnableDropPodInterce: High-integrity buildable roofs will block and redirect incoming drop pods and skyfallers (like meteorites and spaceship debris) to prevent them from landing directly inside your rooms.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_EnableSkylightCoatin: Skylights will passively accumulate dirt, pollen, and snow over time. This reduces the light passing through them and requires manual cleaning by pawns.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_EnableLightningStrik: Lightning strikes can target cells covered by oofs. If disabled, lightning will only strike completely unroofed areas.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_EnableRoofLightningE: Lightning strikes hitting a roof will cause a rooftop explosion and fire.
LanguageData.Stratum_ModSettings_EnableSkylightShadow: Toggles high-quality corner shadow fading, dynamic light pools, and overhead shadow mesh updates under skylights. Disabling this can improve performance on low-end PCs or very large maps.
